emails.subject: IDNR Consent
emails.body: Ben: Can you locate this document in the data room and forward to stuart zisman? I am in Chicago tomorrow and Friday and then Monday-Tuesday of next week. Call me on my cell phone if we need to discuss (713-412-4612). This document was in one of the last packages from Peoples Energy that went down to the data room. Thanks, Fred Forwarded by Fred Mitro/HOU/ECT on 10/04/2000 06:24 PM "Jay Sonnenberg" <jsonnenberg@bracepatt.com> on 10/04/2000 06:17:19 PM
